summary: Phase 0 (Design System + Global Shell) verified end-to-end. Backend: /api/health, /api/me, /api/openapi.json and CORS all green (6/6 pytest). Frontend: AppShell, TopBar, Sidebar (10 items in correct order with active state), AI widget pill, /agents Phase 1 badge, NotFound, and console-error-free load all pass. Wallet driven by /api/me shows -₹1,094,785.66 in rose color as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Optional: backend currently connects to MongoDB at import time even though Phase 0 has no DB usage — fine for now, but consider lazy init in later phases so the API can boot without Mongo.
Optional: TopBar and Sidebar both call useQuery(['me']) — React Query already de-dups by key so it is fine; just call this out for future devs that share the same key intentionally.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all spec checks: shell, topbar, 10-nav order + active state, avatar HK, AI pill on /, /agents, /settings, NotFound, no console errors)

test_credentials: Not applicable — Phase 0 has no auth; /api/me is hardcoded by design.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 0 shell is solid. data-testids in place: app-shell, topbar, sidebar, app-main, ai-widget-pill, sidebar-avatar, topbar-tenant-pill, topbar-wallet, topbar-wallet-balance, topbar-sso-pill, topbar-copilot-btn, topbar-talk-link, topbar-recharge-link, topbar-appswitch-btn, topbar-support-btn, nav-{home,campaigns,push,flows,instagram,segments,audience,agents,analytics,settings}, page-{...}, page-not-found, section-placeholder-badge. /agents intentionally shows 'Coming in Phase 1' badge. AI pill is at bottom-20 right-6 (above Made-with-Emergent badge) — by design. Backend openapi lives at /api/openapi.json (ingress contract). When Phase 1 starts, extend backend tests for new endpoints and replace placeholder pages — current backend_test will continue to pass as a regression.
